prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约734名、714名、725名、620名、730名。整体波动较小，近5年位次在620–734之间窄幅震荡，2024年曾冲高至620名（近年最佳），2025年回落至730名，与2021–2023年水平基本持平，未出现明显趋势性上升或下降；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为42人，2025年增至45人，2026年进一步扩至50人，较2025年扩招约11.1%。扩招意味着投放名额增加，在报考热度不变或略降的情况下，最低录取位次可能后移（数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第7名（2021–2026年），属于全国顶尖高校（C9联盟成员），办学层次极高，对高分考生有持续强吸引力；2025年声誉偏正面（李政道先生逝世，其曾为少年班创立做出贡献，提升学校声誉）；2026年声誉偏负面（一名教授因贪污助不合资格学生入读硕士被判囚，影响师德形象）。抖音热度总排名第12（高热），2022年曾排第2，整体短视频曝光量高，报考关注度较高。；第五轮学科评估中，A-及以上学科多达19个，其中A+学科包括数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程，A学科包括计算机科学与技术、材料科学与工程、管理科学与工程、工商管理。理科试验班类覆盖数学、物理、化学、生物等A+基础学科，工科试验班覆盖计算机（A）、信息与通信工程（A-）等热门工科，学科实力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业涵盖理科试验班类（含量子信息科学、数学类华罗庚英才班、物理学类严济慈英才班等）、工科试验班（信息智能与集成电路，含计算机类华夏英才班、人工智能、集成电路等）、工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）。计算机、人工智能、集成电路、量子信息等均为当前高热专业，对高分考生吸引力强。山东省2026年普通高考考生总数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大，竞争有所加剧。；中国科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，非山东省本地高校，在山东无本地招生倾斜。该校在山东招生计划占比较小（约50人），属跨省招生，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅震荡、2026年扩招约11.1%、山东省考生增加约5.7%、学校层次极高且专业热度高、声誉偏负面等因素：扩招和考生增加共同推动位次后移，但学校顶尖层次和热门专业对高分考生的强吸引力形成对冲。以2025年基准730名为基础，经，结合其他信息判断修正量为0。预测2026年最低录取位次约779名，波动区间690–868名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（信息智能与集成电路）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班类（含量子信息科学、数学类、物理学类、化学类、生物科学类等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约779名，区间690–868名。位次在区间内建议以二档理科试验班类为主力、一档信息智能工科试验班冲刺、三档力学航天工科试验班保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如690名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。该校整体录取位次极靠前，竞争激烈，建议考生结合自身兴趣与学科评估等级合理选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 734, 714, 725, 620, and 730 respectively. Overall fluctuations are small, with rankings oscillating narrowly between 620 and 734 in the past five years. In 2024, it surged to 620 (the best in recent years), and in 2025 it fell back to 730, roughly on par with the 2021–2023 levels, showing no clear upward or downward trend. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province was 42 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 45 in 2025, and further expanded to 50 in 2026, an increase of about 11.1% compared to 2025. Expansion means more slots are available. If application enthusiasm remains unchanged or slightly decreases, the minimum admission ranking may shift backward (numerical increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (2021–2026). It is a top national university (member of the C9 League) with an extremely high academic level, continuously attracting high-scoring students. In 2025, its reputation was slightly positive (the passing of Mr. Tsung-Dao Lee, who contributed to the establishment of the Special Class for the Gifted Young, enhanced the university's reputation). In 2026, its reputation was slightly negative (a professor was imprisoned for embezzlement and helping unqualified students gain admission to a master's program, affecting the image of faculty ethics). Its overall popularity on Douyin ranks 12th (high heat), and it was ranked 2nd in 2022, indicating high short video exposure and considerable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ disciplines such as Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, and Safety Science and Engineering, and A disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and Business Administration. The Science Experimental Class covers A+ basic disciplines like Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology, while the Engineering Experimental Class covers popular engineering fields like Computer Science (A) and Information and Communication Engineering (A-), demonstrating extremely strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 enrollment majors include the Science Experimental Class (including Quantum Information Science, Mathematics Class Hua Luogeng Elite Class, Physics Class Yan Jici Elite Class, etc.), the Engineering Experimental Class (Information Intelligence and Integrated Circuits, including Computer Class Huaxia Elite Class, Artificial Intelligence, Integrated Circuits, etc.), and the Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety). Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Integrated Circuits, and Quantum Information are all currently high-heat majors, strongly attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, not a local university in Shandong, so there is no local admission preference in Shandong. Its enrollment plan in Shandong accounts for a small proportion (about 50 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, an enrollment expansion of about 11.1% in 2026, an increase of about 5.7% in Shandong candidates, the extremely high university level and high major popularity, and a slightly negative reputation, the expansion and increase in candidates jointly push the ranking backward, but the university's top-tier status and popular majors strongly attract high-scoring students, creating a counterbalance. Based on the 2025 baseline of 730, and after incorporating other information, the adjustment is determined to be 0. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 779, with a fluctuation range of 690–868.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Intelligence and Integrated Circuits).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Experimental Class (including Quantum Information Science, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biological Sciences, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 779, range 690–868. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on the Tier 2 Science Experimental Class as the main choice, aim for the Tier 1 Information Intelligence Engineering Experimental Class as a reach, and use the Tier 3 Mechanics and Aerospace Engineering Experimental Class as a safety. Candidates significantly above the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 690) can focus on reaching for the Tier 1 flagship majors. The overall admission ranking of this university is extremely high, with intense competition. Candidates are advised to choose based on their interests and discipline evaluation levels.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
